questions.question: The Dhubri Phulbari bridge which was making news recently, is to be built over which river?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently laid the foundation stone for Dhubri-Phulbari Bridge over Brahmaputra river.It is a 19 km long 4-lane bridge to be laid from Dhubri in Assam to Phulbari in Meghalaya. The bridge will improve transport connectivity in the Barak valley. It also reduces the distance between the four North eastern states of Meghalaya, Manipur, Mizoram and Assam.

questions.question: Which country chaired the Commonwealth Law Ministers Meeting on the legal aspects of Covid -19?
questions.explanation: The Commonwealth High Level Law Ministers Meeting on the Legal aspects of COVID-19 was chaired by the Law Minister of Sri Lanka. It was organised in virtual mode by Commonwealth Secretariat.Anoop Kumar Mendiratta, Secretary, Department of Legal Affairs, Ministry of Law & Justice represented India on behalf of Union Minister for Law & Justice Shri Ravi Shankar Prasad. He said that India used video-conferencing to dispose the cases in a timely fashion during the pandemic.

questions.question: Which Indian personality has been appointed as the Under-Secretary-General and Associate Administrator of the UNDP?
questions.explanation: India’s leading investment professional, Usha Rao-Monari, has been appointed by the UN chief Antonio Guterres as Under-Secretary-General and Associate Administrator of the UNDP.She has served in several senior positions in the area of infrastructure investment, including Director of the Sustainable Business Advisory Group at the International Finance Corporation, part of the World Bank Group.

questions.question: Arunachal Pradesh and Mizoram celebrate their Statehood day on which date?
questions.explanation: Arunachal Pradesh and Mizoram received their statehood on February 20, 1987, following the 53rd Amendment of the Indian Constitution in 1986.On 20th January 1972, the North East Frontier Agency (NEFA) was renamed as Union Territory of Arunachal Pradesh and on 20th February 1987 statehood was granted to Arunachal Pradesh. Mizoram was also a Union Territory from 1972 to 1987 before achieving statehood.

questions.question: “Passport Seva Programme 2.0” is the initiative of which Union Ministry?
questions.explanation: Ministry of External Affairs has recently inaugurated the “DigiLocker” platform for the “Passport Seva Programme” of the Ministry.Under the Passport Seva Programme V2.0, the citizens can submit the documents required for passport services in a paperless mode. DigiLocker is an initiative of the Ministry of Electronics and IT (MeitY). The issued documents in the system are deemed to be at par with original physical documents.

questions.question: Which state has passed an ordinance giving co-ownership rights to women in husband’s ancestral property?
questions.explanation: In a land mark move, the state government of Uttarakhand has passed an ordinance, which gives co-ownership rights to women in their husband’s ancestral property. This ordinance amends the Uttarakhand Zamindari abolition and land reforms act.This ordinance has been moved in view of large-scale migration of male members of the state to other regions of the country.

questions.question: “Fostering multilingualism for inclusion in education and society” is the theme of which special day, celebrated on February 21?
questions.explanation: International Mother Language Day is celebrated every year on February 21. The theme for this year is “Fostering multilingualism for inclusion in education and society”.In 1999, the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO) had declared 21st February as International Mother Language Day. It was on the same date, Bangladesh fought for their Bangla language, which transformed into a language-based national movement.

questions.question: When is the ‘World Day of Social Justice’ observed?
questions.explanation: Every year, the World Day of Social Justice is observed on February 20. The prime objective of this observance is to raise voice against social injustice.It also aims to bring various international organisations and communities on a single platform to end poverty, gender discrimination, physical discrimination, illiteracy, religious discrimination etc. This year, the theme is “A call for social justice in the Digital Economy.”

questions.question: Which Indian state launched its first paperless budget of Rs 5.50 lakh crore?
questions.explanation: The state Government of Uttar Pradesh presented the first paperless budget of Rs 5.50 lakh crore in the state. The budget for the Financial Year 2021-22 was presented by the state’s Finance Minister Suresh Khanna. All members of the UP Legislative Assembly were given tablets to read the budget and a mobile app called “Uttar Pradesh Sarkar ka Budget” was also launched.

questions.question: Which airport is set to be renamed as Maryada Purushottam Sriram Airport?
questions.explanation: The Government of UP in its state budget has announced that the under-construction airport at Ayodhya would be named as Maryada Purushottam Sriram Airport.The budget has made a provision for Rs.101 crores for the airport. It is also envisaged that the airport would soon be made an international airport.
